title: Oscar — restaurant in Ternopil
description: A modern restaurant with European and Ukrainian cuisine, live music, and a cozy atmosphere in the heart of Ternopil. Ideal for dinners, celebrations, and meetings with friends.

intro.title: Where taste meets atmosphere
intro.text: Oscar combines a refined menu, warm interior, and genuine hospitality. Every evening here is a small celebration — whether it's a romantic dinner, a family gathering, or a business lunch. Our team creates an atmosphere where you want to return.

sections.title: Cuisine
items: Author's dishes of European and Ukrainian cuisine
Wide selection of wines and cocktails

sections.title: Banquets & Events
items: Banquet hall for up to 60 guests

sections.title: Summer Terrace
items: Cozy outdoor terrace in warm season

sections.title: Bar
items: Quality wine list from around the world

service.title: Our service
service.text: The Oscar team helps guests plan their dinner, celebration, or meeting with attention to comfort, timing, and every important detail.
